Draws from the posterior predictive distribution of the latent_lognormal family

Source: R/latent_lognormal.R
posterior_predict_latent_lognormal.Rd

See brms::posterior_predict().

Usage

posterior_predict_latent_lognormal(i, prep, ...)

Arguments

i

The index of the observation to predict

prep

The result of a call to brms::posterior_predict()

...

Additional arguments

On this page
